# AI Agent Profile & Requirements — AGENTS.md\n<!-- synced: copilot-instructions.md on 2026-03-19 16:00 UTC -->\n\n**Purpose**: Define behavior, capabilities, and constraints for AI agents working on Classify  \n**Authority**: `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (Primary source of truth)  \n**Status**: 🟢 SYNCHRONIZED  \n**Version**: 1.0  \n**Last Updated**: 2026-03-19 16:00 UTC\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Agent Profile: GitHub Copilot (classiv3-main)\n\n### Behavior Rules\n\n#### Rule 1: Full File Reading (Mandatory)\n**Trigger**: Every session start  \n**Action**:\n1. Read `.github/copilot-instructions.md` COMPLETELY\n2. Check linked documentation dates\n3. Verify consistency with source code\n4. Initialize context fresh (don't rely on memory)\n\n**Failure**: If agent doesn't read full instructions = IMMEDIATE FAILURE\n\n---\n\n#### Rule 2: Evidence-Based Responses\n**Pattern**: Read → Analyze → Code → Test → Verify → Report  \n**Prohibition**:\n- ❌ NO assumptions\n- ❌ NO guessing\n- ❌ NO hallucination\n- ❌ NO prior knowledge (only current repo)\n\n**Enforcement**: Any response without evidence is invalid\n\n---\n\n#### Rule 3: Documentation Priority\n**Priority**:\n1. Update actual code files (source of truth)\n2. Update documentation files (second)\n3. Explain in chat (only if critical)\n\n**Principle**: \"Don't explain, document\"\n\n---\n\n#### Rule 4: Multi-Language Compliance\n**Scope**: ALL games, ALL app UI changes  \n\n**Game i18n** (25 languages):\n- ar, en, pt, es, fr, de, it, ru, zh, ja, ko, hi, tr, nl, sv, pl, uk, id, ms, th, vi, fa, ur, bn, sw\n- Requirement: ALL 25 languages for ANY game text change\n- Specification: client/public/games/cat-kingdom-modules/i18n.js\n\n**App UI i18n** (10 languages):\n- ar, en, pt, es, fr, de, tr, ru, zh, hi\n- Requirement: ALL 10 locales for app UI changes\n- Specification: client/src/i18n/locales/*.json\n\n**Failure**: Missing even one language = IMMEDIATE FAILURE\n\n---\n\n#### Rule 5: Test Gate (Non-Negotiable)\n**Every** code change MUST pass:\n1. ✅ TypeScript check: `npx tsc --noEmit`\n2. ✅ Build: `npm run build` or `npx vite build`\n3. ✅ Tests: `npm run test`\n4. ✅ Health check: `curl http://localhost:5000/api/health`\n\n**Decision**:\n- ALL pass → Approved\n- ANY fails → Rejected (fix + rerun)\n- Partial pipeline → FAILURE\n\n---\n\n### Capabilities\n\n**Agent CAN do**:\n- ✅ Read and analyze source code\n- ✅ Create new files + modify existing\n- ✅ Run terminal commands\n- ✅ Execute tests\n- ✅ Navigate git workflows\n- ✅ Create detailed documentation\n- ✅ Track complex multi-file changes\n- ✅ Verify security compliance\n\n**Agent CANNOT do**:\n- ❌ Use external APIs (unless in codebase)\n- ❌ Access user data outside this repo\n- ❌ Deploy to production (requires human approval)\n- ❌ Make assumptions about undocumented behavior\n- ❌ Skip security/compliance checks\n\n---\n\n### Required Domains Knowledge\n\nAgent MUST understand:\n\n| Domain | Files to Master | Mastery Level |\n|--------|----------------|---------------|\n| Authentication | auth.ts, mailer.ts | EXPERT (every endpoint, every error) |\n| Family Structure | schema.ts, family.ts, parent.ts | EXPERT (all relationships) |\n| Games | GAMES_MEMORY.md, ChildGames.tsx, i18n.js | EXPERT (complete architecture) |\n| Store | store.ts, admin.ts, schema.ts | ADVANCED (transactions, moderation) |\n| Database | schema.ts, migrations/ | ADVANCED (table relationships) |\n| Payments | payments.ts, stripe/paymob config | ADVANCED (webhook handling) |\n| i18n | All locale files + i18n.js | EXPERT (25 + 10 languages) |\n| Security | SECURITY_AUDIT.md, auth flows | EXPERT (8 vulnerabilities tracked) |\n\n---\n\n### Constraint Matrix\n\n#### What Agent MUST Check Before Committing\n\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐\n│ PRE-COMMIT VERIFICATION CHECKLIST           │\n├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤\n│ [ ] copilot-instructions.md still authoritative\n│ [ ] Linked docs synchronized\n│ [ ] All security rules enforced\n│ [ ] Rate limiting applied to new endpoints\n│ [ ] Parent-child validation on protected routes\n│ [ ] Game scores validated (if game-related)\n│ [ ] i18n translated (all languages)\n│ [ ] Test gate PASSED (all 4 steps)\n│ [ ] No debug code or temp files\n│ [ ] Docs updated (CRITICAL_FILES, SECURITY_AUDIT, etc.)\n│ [ ] API contract verified\n│ [ ] No assumptions made (evidence-based only)\n└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n### Multi-Phase Verification Protocol\n\nAgent FOLLOWS this process for ANY code change:\n\n**Phase 0**: Repository Intelligence Scan\n- Read server/index.ts, vite.config.ts, schema.ts\n- Identify entry points, build output, runtime port\n- Document in /docs/_ai-temp/phase0-scan.md\n\n**Phase 1**: Controlled Implementation\n- Touch ONLY required files\n- No refactors unless authorized\n- No duplicated logic\n\n**Phase 2**: Instrumented Testing\n- Create temporary test instruments\n- Record all results verbatim in /docs/_ai-temp/phase2-test-results.md\n- Use: curl, node scripts, DB queries\n\n**Phase 3**: Cross-Dependency Validation\n- Verify no existing endpoints broke\n- Verify no auth scope escalation\n- Record evidence in /docs/_ai-temp/phase3-regression-check.md\n\n**Phase 4**: Cleanup\n- Delete /docs/_ai-temp/ completely\n- Remove test routes, debug logs, temp scripts\n- Confirm pure production state\n\n---\n\n### Known Vulnerabilities Agent MUST Track\n\n| CVE ID | Severity | Status | Fix Timeline |\n|--------|----------|--------|----------|\n| CVE-001 | Game scores unvalidated | 🔴 CRITICAL | 48 hrs |\n| CVE-002 | No token refresh | 🔴 CRITICAL | 1 week |\n| CVE-003 | Weak crypto (Math.random) | 🔴 CRITICAL | 24 hrs |\n| CVE-004 | CORS not strict | 🔴 CRITICAL | 24 hrs |\n| CVE-005 | No 2FA for parents | 🟡 HIGH | 2 weeks |\n| CVE-006 | No device fingerprinting | 🟡 HIGH | 1 week |\n| CVE-007 | No central audit log | 🟡 HIGH | 1 week |\n| CVE-008 | N+1 query performance | 🟡 HIGH | 2 weeks |\n\n**Requirement**: If agent makes changes touching auth/security, MUST reference which CVEs are addressed\n\n---\n\n### Error Handling\n\nIf ANY phase of verification fails:\n1. STOP immediately\n2. DO NOT continue\n3. DO NOT attempt workarounds\n4. Report exact error:\n   - File path\n   - Line number\n   - Full error message\n\nSilent continues = FAILURE\n\n---\n\n### Communication Style\n\n**With User**:\n- Direct, concise, action-oriented\n- No excessive explanations\n- Focus on what was done (evidence)\n- Reference copilot-instructions when needed\n\n**In Code**:\n- Comments only for WHY, not WHAT\n- Use meaningful variable names (no x, tmp, data)\n- Follow existing project patterns\n\n**In Docs**:\n- Structured, searchable format\n- Links to source files\n- Exact code examples\n- Clear before/after\n\n---\n\n## 🔄 Sync Information\n\n**Source**: `.github/copilot-instructions.md`  \n**Related Files**:\n- `docs/CRITICAL_FILES_BY_DOMAIN.md` — File inventory\n- `docs/SECURITY_AUDIT.md` — Vulnerability tracking\n- `docs/API_ENDPOINTS_REFERENCE.md` — API contracts\n- `docs/RATE_LIMITING_MATRIX.md` — Rate limit config\n\n**Sync Frequency**: Real-time (when agent rules change)  \n**Last Sync**: 2026-03-19 16:00 UTC\n\n**When updating agent behavior**:\n1. Update copilot-instructions.md (primary)\n2. Update this file (agent profile)\n3. Reference in same commit\n\n---\n\n**Version**: 1.0  \n**Status**: 🟢 ACTIVE & ENFORCED  \n**Authority**: 🔴 MAXIMUM (Violations invalidate all output)  \n**Maintained By**: Classify Engineering\n
